output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?round wdt:P302 wd:Q33224 .
  ?round rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , '5th round') && LANGMATCHES(LANG(?label) , 'en'))
  .
  ?round wdt:P585 ?date .
}

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?round wdt:P302 wd:Q33224 .
  ?round rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , '5th round') && LANGMATCHES(LANG(?label) , 'en'))
  .
  ?round wdt:P585 ?date .
}
```
